overall.description: A student wizard in dark robes browses books in a grand historic library with towering wooden shelves and stone architecture. Another person walks through the background archway. Third-person game engine footage with warm interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with towering bookshelves

large stone archway leading to another section of the library, visible in the background

red and gold patterned rug on the floor in the background area

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a warm-lit historic library with stone walls and wooden floors. The player character, a student in wizard robes, stands at a tall bookshelf browsing volumes. A golden armor statue stands prominently between the shelves. In the background, an NPC walks through a stone archway from right to left, crossing the distant part of the hall before exiting the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warm-lit historic library, focusing on a student wizard amidst towering shelves and stone architecture. It begins with the character in dark robes browsing volumes at a tall wooden bookshelf, while a golden armor statue stands prominently nearby. As the camera lingers on the scene, the perspective captures a distant stone archway where an NPC walks from right to left. The movement then follows the figure as they cross the hall, finally exiting the frame against the backdrop of the library's stone walls and wooden floors.
